default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: You traversed time and brought me back to this world from the bottom of the lightless abyss... I hope that in the near future, you won't come to regret this.

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: This power has shaped me.

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: At the end of the forbidden path lies only endless chaos.

default.title: Level Start
default.text: Reaching... the bottom of the abyss.

default.title: Victory
default.text: Nothing can stop us now.

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: It's okay, you still have countless chances.

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: Listen... to Its whispers.

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: I will return from the abyss... once again...

default.title: Greeting
default.text: It feels like we've been apart for quite a while... Is something troubling you? Come, sit down and chat with me.

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: The calmer the waters, the darker and more profound the secrets that lie beneath. This is the most important lesson Shin's time as an oceanographer has taught her.

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: Their deaths have long been destined... If you wish to change such fate, then hold fast to this power, no matter where it comes from.

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: Family, duty, expeditions... all of these feel so distant to me now. I no longer need such things. Only forbidden knowledge and power flow through my flesh and soul. This feeling... is beyond compare.

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: The abyss does not breed chaos. Chaos comes from within, existing as a reflection beneath every pristine soul, impossible to ignore or sever... Only by embracing it can we become whole.

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: Human minds are far too fragile. They cannot gaze directly upon the truths buried deep in the abyss, much less bear the curse of omniscience. Only eternal life can carry such power... My very existence is proof of that, don't you think?

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: After all this time, are you still dwelling on what happened to them? That's alright. When the day comes that you remember everything and reclaim your power, you'll understand that you and I are each other's true kindred spirit.

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: Your existence stems from foresight that even I cannot comprehend. You will ultimately follow Its design, accept your true nature, and carry out Its will... I look forward to that day.

default.title: Idle
default.text: Are you feeling tired? Hmm, well, your body is still human after all. It has far too many obvious flaws...

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: Haha, have you noticed? Even though I may not look that different, this body has long since borne no semblance of a human.

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: Seeking companionship, or keeping watch over a threat... or perhaps both? Whatever purpose brought you here, I'm willing to accept it.

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: Are you sure... you want me to go?

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: I'm back, as you wish.

default.title: Level Up
default.text: It has become a part of me.

default.title: Pat Head
default.text: Does this comfort you? Hmm, what a fussy child you are.

stellar_embrace.title: Attire Obtained
stellar_embrace.text: Newborn star from the depths... come to me... A cosmic tempest approaches, and only in my embrace will you find warmth and sanctuary.

stellar_embrace.title: Level Up
stellar_embrace.text: I can feel you... coming toward me...

stellar_embrace.title: Greeting
stellar_embrace.text: I've been waiting for you, my little lost star... Come into my embrace, and together we'll ignite this chaos and darkness, turning it into a glorious new galaxy. Shall we?

stellar_embrace.title: Pat Head
stellar_embrace.text: What a greedy child you are. Very well... come into my arms.

stellar_embrace.title: Ordinary Contact 1
stellar_embrace.text: Destruction will turn into a cradle for new hope... Just like how you appeared before me and lit up this sea of stars, the silent grave of civilizations.

stellar_embrace.title: Ordinary Contact 2
stellar_embrace.text: This brilliant nebula... would you ever guess it had perished in heat death? Yet it was most beautiful in its dying moment... I've dreamed of witnessing that again, with you by my side...

stellar_embrace.title: Ordinary Contact 3
stellar_embrace.text: I've watched countless stars burn out painfully, never reaching the threshold of change... until you brought life to everything. Come, witness with me... witness this all-devouring birth!

stellar_embrace.title: Ordinary Contact 4
stellar_embrace.text: The Big Bang will shatter and remake everything. We'll collapse into imperceptible particles in the cosmos, locked in a desperate embrace in a vaster, more perfect universe... hehe...

stellar_embrace.title: Idle
stellar_embrace.text: Sleep now... When the stars all fade away, my embrace will remain as your final galaxy.

stellar_embrace.title: Special Attention
stellar_embrace.text: You need not cling to me, nor fear our separation... These dark stars, which are my eyes, will embrace you, pull you in, and never, ever let you go...
